title: Body of woman found in bushes near Red Bridge
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The body of an unknown woman...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The body of an unknown woman was discovered near the Red Bridge in Knysna last Friday morning.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The body of an unknown woman was discovered near the Red Bridge in Knysna last Friday morning."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies said that Knysna Police opened an inquest docket after the body was found in bushes next to a gravel road on Friday 12 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to police reports, a member of the public alerted authorities after discovering the body at about 09:00.","html":"According to police reports, a member of the public alerted authorities after discovering the body at about 09:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Upon arrival, officers were led to the body, which was found to be in an advanced stage of decomposition. The deceased had a tattoo reading ‘444’ on the left side of her chest,\" said Spies.","html":"“Upon arrival, officers were led to the body, which was found to be in an advanced stage of decomposition. The deceased had a tattoo reading ‘444’ on the left side of her chest,\" said Spies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The circumstances surrounding the woman’s death are currently under investigation.","html":"The circumstances surrounding the woman’s death are currently under investigation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone with information that could assist police in identifying the deceased or tracing her next of kin is urged to contact the investigating officer at the Knysna Detectives on 044 302 6652, or Crime Stop on 08600 10111.","html":"Anyone with information that could assist police in identifying the deceased or tracing her next of kin is urged to contact the investigating officer at the Knysna Detectives on 044 302 6652, or Crime Stop on 08600 10111."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Body of woman found in bushes near Red Bridge
